$description: Shared team knowledge — committed to git, syncs with collaborators. This is the GitHub-based shared memory index.
$usage: Claude reads this file to find shared learnings. Update via /learn skill or manually. Push to share with team.

fixes.value: Integration tests returned 401 because WebApplicationFactory's ConfigureServices runs BEFORE the app's Program.cs, so the app's JWT scheme overwrites the test scheme. Fix: use ConfigureTestServices (runs AFTER) to replace DefaultAuthenticateScheme and DefaultChallengeScheme with a fake TestAuthHandler.
fixes.author: nhan

fixes.value: Identity.API crashes on startup with 'IdentityUrl configuration is required' because it validates JWT tokens on its own REST endpoints and needs Authority URL for OIDC discovery. Fix: add IdentityUrl=https://identity-api:8443 to docker-compose.override.yml for the identity-api service.
fixes.author: nhan

gotchas.value: Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore's UseVector() extension on NpgsqlDbContextOptionsBuilder shadows Pgvector's UseVector() on NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder. When both packages are in scope, the compiler picks the wrong overload. Fix: isolate NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder.UseVector() in a separate file that only imports 'using Pgvector;' without EF Core usings.
gotchas.author: nhan

gotchas.value: Npgsql 8+ requires explicit opt-in for JSONB serialization of Dictionary<string,string> via EnableDynamicJson() on NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder. Without it, saving entities with JSONB columns throws 'Writing values of Dictionary is not supported'. The app's normal UseNpgsql doesn't call this — it works in production because of different initialization paths, but test factories that rebuild the DbContext need it explicitly.
gotchas.author: nhan
